release_notes: v1.1.0 — Verbatim AI answers in the Product, Personas and Buying Journey sections are now clearly marked NOT FACT-CHECKED in the PDF, Word export and on screen, so quoted model output is never mistaken for an Atlas finding (those sections previously read as Atlas analysis). YouTube adds a trailing-12-month view — a Recent Views column, a 'published in the last 12 months' drill-down and a matching gap — so current momentum isn't buried under years-old uploads. Targeted Review gap cards now show full competitive standings: your rank in the field plus a leaderboard, instead of only the top competitor. A new API Usage card in Settings shows this month's calls, tokens and estimated cost per provider in one place. Also adds 9 brands to the Knowledge library and removes an empty prompt entry.
